name: Chunghsin Technology Group Co., Ltd
summary: Chunghsin Technology Group Co., Ltd researches, develops, produces, and sells consumer electronics in China. The company offers flat-panel TVs, tablet computers, mobile phones, notebook computers, set-top boxes, DVDs, and other products. Chunghsin Technology Group Co., Ltd also sells its products in approximately 40 countries and regions, including North America, Europe, and Oceania. Chunghsin Technology Group Co., Ltd is based in Taizhou, China.
